title: Senior AI Engineer
company_focus: Water, hygiene and energy technologies and services
description:
Job Characteristics: Lead the development of scalable GenAI-
powered systems, designing intelligent workflows that
leverage large language models (LLMs), vector-based
retrieval, and multi-agent orchestration frameworks. Drive
solution architecture, mentor junior engineers, and deliver
production-ready applications that integrate deeply with
business processes and platforms.

Education/Work Experience: Degree and 5-8 years experience.

Independence Level/Reports to: Normally reports to AI
Engineering Manager.
responsibilities: Lead development of scalable GenAI-powered systems
Design intelligent workflows leveraging LLMs, vector-based retrieval, and multi-agent orchestration
Drive solution architecture for AI applications
Mentor junior engineers on AI engineering best practices
Deliver production-ready AI applications that integrate with business processes and platforms
use_cases: Intelligent workflow automation for business processes
Business process integration with AI systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves building GenAI-powered systems,
working with LLMs, vector retrieval, and multi-agent
orchestration. The engineer will design and deliver
production-ready AI applications, which is hands-on work
with AI/ML systems.
